Stay a step ahead with Coingenius arbitrage historical analysis

We are providing you the analysis of historical cryptocurrency arbitrage data to help you refine your cryptocurrency arbitrage strategies and plan two-step ahead even before the original arbitrage occurs

Automate your arbitrage process

“Say hello to the Coingenius WebSocket API – your gateway to fully automated, real-time arbitrage trading. Seamlessly link your trading bot with Coingenius’ powerful arbitrage engine and let it scan the markets 24/7, catching profit opportunities the moment they appear. No more manual monitoring, no more missed chances – just smart, continuous, lightning-fast trading, even while you sleep.
Welcome to the future of crypto arbitrage!”

Our product f eatures

These features form the basis of our service

Real-time data

The faster you fetch, the more edge users have, and we give our users an edge over everyone else

Trading volume in arbitrage

Considering trading volume while calculating arbitrage helps to find the maximum profit and removes all the junk arbitrages

Live tracking of arbitrage

One of the most unique features, let you see all the details pertaining to that arbitrage including the order books on a single screen

Set Alerts

Never miss an opportunity even when you are away as we send the alerts on telegram and on your browser

Set Investment Limit

Tell us the amount you want to invest and we will show arbitrages accordingly

All charges included in the calculation

In arbitrage, we have considered all trading and transfer charges so that you have nothing to worry about

Arbitrage time

Info on total time to complete the whole arbitrage, and the minimum amount to get no loss no profit

Real-time notifications

In Coingenius , we send notifications to all users if we see any good arbitrage opportunities or sudden price change took place

UX best experience

Smooth navigation, clean structure, and thoughtful flows — so users stay longer, convert faster, and come back often.

Unboxing the Answers to Your Product Questions

The most popular

What is crypto analysis and why is it important?

We are providing you the analysis of historical cryptocurrency arbitrage data to help you refine your cryptocurrency arbitrage strategies and plan two-step ahead even before the original arbitrage occurs

Do I need trading experience to use your analytics tools?

No, you don’t! Our platform is designed for both beginners and experienced traders. We provide intuitive dashboards, simplified metrics, and guided insights to help you make informed decisions — no advanced trading background required.

How often is the data updated?

Our data is updated in real-time or near real-time, depending on the specific data source. This ensures you always have the most current information for tracking market movements and making timely decisions.

What types of cryptocurrencies do you support?

We support a wide range of cryptocurrencies, including major coins like Bitcoin (BTC), Ethereum (ETH), and Solana (SOL), as well as many altcoins and emerging tokens. The list is regularly updated as new assets gain traction.

Can I customize alerts and analytics?

Absolutely! You can set custom alerts for price changes, market trends, volume spikes, and more. Our analytics dashboards are also configurable — choose the metrics and timeframes that matter most to you.
